title: Structures, Unions, Tagged Variants, and Flexible Arrays · Failure Case: Flexible Array Allocation
summary: A packet queue combines headers and payloads while a changed variant exposes padding, inactive-union, and size-formula errors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem flexible array allocation increment in tagged packet representation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Allocate flexible-array objects with checked header-plus-elements arithmetic and record their element count.
Pair a union with an explicit discriminant and access only the active, validated member.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
